overview.value: ArianeGroup Holding is jointly owned (50%/50%) by Airbus and Safran, and was founded in 2016 through the merger of its shareholders' civil and defence space launch systems activities. The group operates through two national subsidiaries, ArianeGroup SAS in France and ArianeGroup GmbH in Germany.

status.value: Joint venture equally owned (50/50) by Airbus and Safran
